overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character in a spacesuit exploring a snowy, rocky alien landscape at night. The character walks steadily through the terrain under a dark sky with visible nebula clouds, casting a long shadow on the snow-covered ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: alien tundra with scattered rock outcrops

events.description: character turns slightly to the left while continuing to walk forward

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through deep snow toward distant rock formations, casting a long shadow

entered.detail: expansive snow-covered ground stretching to the horizon
large gray rock formation partially buried in snow
prominent light-colored boulder visible in the distance
dark sky with greenish nebula clouds visible on the left horizon
distant rocky hills on the left side of the frame

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a third-person view of a spacesuited character walking through a vast snowy alien landscape under a dark nebula-filled sky. The character moves steadily forward past scattered rock outcrops, with a large white rock formation visible in the distance ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: open snow plain approaching large rock formation

events.description: character approaches within close proximity to the large white rock formation

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk through the snow, approaching the large central rock formation

entered.detail: mountain range visible on the far left horizon
distant rocky hills on the right side

segments.scene_description: The character continues moving through the open snow field, with the large white rock formation growing larger as they approach. The rocky terrain on both sides becomes more defined, and distant mountains appear on the left horizon while the character passes the initial rock outcrops.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy expanse with distant rocky hills

agents.ego_description: walking steadily toward a large rocky hill formation in the distance

entered.detail: substantial rocky mountain formation rising in the distance ahead
small rocks scattered on the snow surface

segments.scene_description: Having passed the large white rock, the character continues through the open snow field toward a substantial rocky hill formation in the distance. The terrain remains consistently snowy and barren, with rocky outcrops now visible on both sides of the path ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement tracking a spacesuited character as they traverse a vast, snowy alien expanse toward increasingly prominent geological formations. It begins with the character walking steadily through a barren landscape under a dark, nebula-filled sky, passing scattered rock outcrops. As the character advances, a distant white rock formation grows larger and more defined, while jagged mountains emerge on the left horizon. The scene then shifts as the character passes the white rock, opening up into a wide snow field where the terrain becomes flanked by rocky outcrops on both sides. Finally, the camera continues its forward progression, guiding the character across the frozen waste toward a substantial rocky hill in the distance.
